name: Galactic Reef
description: You have been assigned the Galactic Reef — a chaotic, high-density cluster of irregular galaxies radiating in emerald, coral pink, and turquoise. Like a bioluminescent coral reef teeming with alien life, this cosmic formation sprawls across space in a dazzling, living tapestry of colour and unordered beauty.

attributes.value: High-density irregular cluster resembling a bioluminescent coral reef
